title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Are you a creative person? How does your creativity express itself?
Do you enjoy any creative activities like painting, writing or music?
What form of art do you personally connect with most? Why?
Do you think creativity is valued enough in education and the workplace?
Have you ever created something you were really proud of?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think creative people are born or made?
Should governments fund the arts? Why or why not?
How do you think artificial intelligence will affect creative industries like music and art?
